hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [[ "$file" == *.py ]] && ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null && ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; true
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in *.env|*credentials*.json|*token.json|*.pem|*.key) echo 'BLOCKED: refusing to edit secrets/credential file' >&2; exit 2;; esac
